meta.summary: Fast protein-to-genome aligner with splicing and frameshift-aware alignment, PAF/GFF3/GTF output, reusable genome indices, and optional splice-score input.
meta.description: Fast protein-to-genome aligner with splicing and frameshift-aware alignment, PAF/GFF3/GTF output, reusable genome indices, and optional splice-score input.

test: miniprot 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: miniprot' >/dev/null && miniprot 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--gff' >/dev/null && miniprot 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--trans' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-miniprot-paf && cd /tmp/taf-miniprot-paf && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-hs.gen.fa.gz ref.fa.gz && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-mm.pep.fa.gz query.faa.gz && miniprot -t1 ref.fa.gz query.faa.gz > aln.paf && grep -F 'ENSMUSP00000025851.4' aln.paf >/dev/null && grep -F 'cg:Z:' aln.paf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-miniprot-gff && cd /tmp/taf-miniprot-gff && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-hs.gen.fa.gz ref.fa.gz && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-mm.pep.fa.gz query.faa.gz && miniprot -t1 --gff ref.fa.gz query.faa.gz > aln.gff && grep -F '##gff-version 3' aln.gff >/dev/null && grep -F '##PAF' aln.gff >/dev/null && miniprot -t1 --gtf ref.fa.gz query.faa.gz > aln.gtf && grep -F 'transcript' aln.gtf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-miniprot-index && cd /tmp/taf-miniprot-index && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-hs.gen.fa.gz ref.fa.gz && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-mm.pep.fa.gz query.faa.gz && miniprot -t1 -d ref.mpi ref.fa.gz && test -s ref.mpi && miniprot -t1 ref.mpi query.faa.gz > indexed.paf && grep -F 'ENSMUSP00000025851.4' indexed.paf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-miniprot-aln && cd /tmp/taf-miniprot-aln && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-hs.gen.fa.gz ref.fa.gz && cp /usr/local/share/doc/miniprot/test/DPP3-mm.pep.fa.gz query.faa.gz && miniprot -t1 --aln --trans ref.fa.gz query.faa.gz > aln.txt && grep -F '##ATA' aln.txt >/dev/null && grep -F '##STA' aln.txt >/dev/null
